Gatherings

Events & Tea Parties

Gather, sip, and celebrate

Infinite Tea: Host With Us!

Gather your friends and family for an unforgettable afternoon in our cozy tea room. We'll handle everything — from the tea to the treats — so you can simply relax and enjoy.

Wednesday – Sunday, 11 AM – 1 PM Evening hours may be available upon request
Most Popular 01

Classic Tea Party

$35 per person
2–4 guests · 90 minutes
  • Choice of tea from our full menu
  • Freshly baked scones with clotted cream & jam
  • Assorted finger sandwiches
  • Petit fours & seasonal sweets
Book Now
02

Grand Tea Party

$50 per person
4–8 guests · 2 hours
  • Premium tea flight — 3 curated selections
  • Full afternoon tea service
  • Savoury course & dessert course
  • Keepsake tea tin to take home
Book Now
03

Children's Tea Party

$20 per child
4–10 children · 1 hour
  • Caffeine-free herbal tea or hot cocoa
  • Mini sandwiches & fruit
  • Cupcakes & cookies
  • Tea party crown & activity sheet
Book Now

Add-Ons & Upgrades

Champagne Toast +$12/person
Fresh Flower Centrepiece +$25
Custom Tea Blend Favours +$8/person

What's Coming Up

Upcoming Events

Apr 12
Tasting

Spring Tea Tasting

Sunday, April 12, 2026 · 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM

Sample the season's first-flush Darjeelings and Japanese Shinchas alongside light bites. Learn what makes spring teas so special.

$25 8 spots available Reserve
Apr 19
Workshop

Watercolour & Tea Workshop

Sunday, April 19, 2026 · 10:00 AM – 12:00 PM

Paint a botanical watercolour while sipping curated teas. All materials provided. No experience needed — just bring your curiosity.

$40 Only 5 spots left Reserve
May 3
Tasting

Evening Chai Experience

Sunday, May 3, 2026 · 6:00 PM – 8:00 PM

An immersive evening exploring the world of chai — from classic masala to Kashmiri noon chai. Includes tastings, spice blending, and a take-home blend.

$30 12 spots available Reserve
May 10
Special Event

Mother's Day Grand Tea

Sunday, May 10, 2026 · 11:00 AM – 1:00 PM

Treat Mum to a special afternoon tea with champagne, a full service, and a gift bag to take home. Reservations required.

$55 Only 3 spots left Reserve
May 17
Tasting

Pu-erh Deep Dive

Sunday, May 17, 2026 · 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM

Explore the world of aged and fermented teas. Taste sheng vs. shou, learn about aging, and discover why collectors prize these cakes.

$35 10 spots available Reserve

Planning Something Special?

We host private events, bridal showers, birthday parties, and corporate gatherings.
